title: Fix Deployment Error 400 - Canister ID Not Resolved

requirements.text: Resolve the 'Error 400: Canister ID Not Resolved' deployment issue by ensuring the frontend build correctly references the deployed canister ID. Verify that the canister ID environment variables are properly injected at build time, that the dfx.json configuration is valid, and that the frontend asset canister is correctly configured so the site loads without a 400 error.

quotes: Error 400 Canister ID Not Resolved pls resolved this error and generate new link

acceptanceCriteria: The deployed site loads without an Error 400 response
The canister ID is correctly resolved in the deployed environment
All existing sections (Hero, About Us, Products, Why Choose Us, Export & Logistics, Certifications, Trust & Stats, Contact, Footer) render correctly after the fix
The site is accessible via a valid ICP deployment URL

constraints: Do not alter any existing UI content, color scheme, or component structure
Do not change contact details (+919712711305, sgexporters8@gmail.com) or company name (SG Exporters)
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or layout
